title: Wither Spawn Fix W.S.A. Compatible
description: A fix for the Wither spawn that works with Wither Spawn Animation
body: The [**Wither Spawn Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-fix) mod solves a common problem where small blocks—like snow layers, buttons, carpets, and plants—interfere with the Wither’s altar and stop it from spawning. However, the original fix isn’t compatible with [**Wither Spawn Animation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/wither-spawn-animation), and using both together breaks the animation completely. This mod fixes that. **Wither Spawn Fix W.S.A. Compatible** lets you keep your animated Wither altars while also having the spawn fix active _Works with:_ - Buttons - Candles - Carpets - Snow layers - Small plants & flowers - Flower pots - And more... _This mod requires:_ - _Wither Spawn Animation to be installed_ - _Wither Spawn Fix to NOT be installed_ [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wither-spawn-fix-wsa-compatible)
